inputs.label: Regular Hours
inputs.businessContext: Normal working hours per period (e.g., per week)

businessContext_i18n.en: Normal working hours per period (e.g., per week)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem başına normal çalışma saatleri (ör. haftalık)
businessContext_i18n.de: Normale Arbeitsstunden pro Periode (z. B. pro Woche)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures de travail normales par période (ex. par semaine)
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas normales de trabajo por período (ej., por semana)

inputs.label: Overtime Hours
inputs.businessContext: Overtime hours worked beyond regular time

businessContext_i18n.en: Overtime hours worked beyond regular time
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fazla mesai saatleri (normal sürenin üzerinde çalışılan)
businessContext_i18n.de: Überstunden, die über die reguläre Zeit hinaus geleistet werden
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures supplémentaires effectuées au-delà des heures normales
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas extra trabajadas fuera del tiempo regular

inputs.label: Overtime Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier applied to hourly rate for overtime (e.g., 1.5 for time and a half)

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier applied to hourly rate for overtime (e.g., 1.5 for time and a half)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fazla mesai için saatlik ücrete uygulanan çarpan (ör. 1.5 bir buçuk kat)
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator auf den Stundensatz für Überstunden (z. B. 1,5 für Zeit und Hälfte)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur appliqué au taux horaire pour les heures supplémentaires (ex. 1,5 pour le tarif majoré de moitié)
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador aplicado a la tarifa por hora para horas extra (ej., 1.5 para tiempo y medio)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
